description: PFC Python SDK documentation index for quick lookup. Keywords are now stored in module-specific files (itasca_keywords.json and modules/*/keywords.json).

itasca.description: Core simulation control and command execution

clump.description: Clump object management - rigid aggregates of pebbles

contact.description: Contact management between balls, pebbles, and facets

clump.pebble.description: Pebble object management - spherical components of clumps

clump.template.description: Clump template management - reusable clump definitions

rblock.template.description: RBlock template management - reusable rigid block templates

measure.description: Measurement sphere management for monitoring local physical quantities

zone.description: Zone object management — the FLAC continuum (finite-volume) grid

gridpoint.description: Gridpoint object management — nodes of the FLAC continuum grid

Ball.description: Ball object instance - spherical particle in PFC
Ball.note: 112 methods - see method_groups for organization. Key methods include pos, vel, spin, force, moment, mass, radius, contacts, groups, props

method_groups.forces: force_app, force_contact, force_unbal (with x/y/z components and setters)
method_groups.moments: moment_app, moment_contact, moment_unbal (with x/y/z components and setters)
method_groups.physical_properties: mass, mass_real, density, radius, damp, moi, moi_real (with setters)
method_groups.other: extra, set_extra, fragment, set_fragment, inside, stress

Clump.description: Clump object instance - rigid aggregate of pebbles
Clump.note: 100+ methods - see method_groups for organization. Key methods include pos, vel, spin, mass, moi, pebbles, calculate, rotate, scale_sphere

method_groups.position_orientation: pos, euler, disp (with _x/_y/_z components and setters)
method_groups.forces: force_app, force_contact, force_unbal (with components and setters)
method_groups.moments: moment_app, moment_contact, moment_unbal (with components and setters)
method_groups.inertia: moi, moi_real, moi_prin (with variants and fixity control)

Pebble.description: Pebble object instance - spherical component of a clump
Pebble.note: 33 methods - pebbles are part of clumps and cannot exist independently

Template.description: Template object instance - reusable clump definition
Template.note: 29 methods - templates define clump geometry and can be instantiated multiple times

method_groups.inertia: moi, moi_prin, moi_prin_x/y/z, set_moi, set_moi_prin, set_moi_prin_x/y/z

RBlock.description: RBlock object instance - polyhedral rigid block in PFC

RBlockTemplate.description: RBlock template object instance - reusable rigid block geometry definition

Contact.description: Contact object instance (all contact types share this interface)

Wall.note: 98 methods total - see Wall.json for complete list

Vertex.description: Wall vertex object instance (controls wall geometry)

Measure.description: Measurement sphere object for monitoring local physical quantities
Measure.note: 18 methods - measurement spheres monitor stress, strain rate, porosity, and coordination in specified regions

method_groups.measurements: coordination, porosity, size, strainrate, strainrate_full, stress, stress_full

Zone.description: Zone object instance — FLAC continuum grid
Zone.note: Do not instantiate directly; use itasca.zone module functions. 103 methods — see method_groups.

method_groups.face: face_extra, face_find, face_find_normal, face_group, face_group_remove, face_in_group, face_normals, set_face_extra, set_face_group
method_groups.stress: set_stress, stress, stress_effective, stress_int, stress_max, stress_min, stress_prin, stress_prin_dir, stress_prin_x, stress_prin_y, stress_prin_z
method_groups.work: set_work_elastic_shear, set_work_elastic_vol, set_work_plastic_shear, set_work_plastic_vol, work_elastic_shear, work_elastic_total, work_elastic_vol, work_plastic_shear, work_plastic_total, work_plastic_vol
method_groups.strain: strain, strain_rate, strain_shear_inc, strain_shear_rate, strain_vol_inc, strain_vol_rate

Gridpoint.description: Gridpoint object instance — FLAC continuum grid
Gridpoint.note: Do not instantiate directly; use itasca.gridpoint module functions. 97 methods — see method_groups.

method_groups.disp: disp, disp_small, disp_small_x, disp_small_y, disp_x, disp_y, set_disp, set_disp_small, set_disp_small_x, set_disp_small_y, set_disp_x, set_disp_y
method_groups.fluid: fluid_load, fluid_modulus, fluid_modulus_confined, fluid_tension, fluid_unbal, fluid_vol_inv, set_fluid_load, set_fluid_modulus, set_fluid_tension, set_fluid_unbal
method_groups.force: force_app, force_app_x, force_app_y, force_load, force_load_x, force_load_y, force_unbal, force_unbal_x, force_unbal_y, set_force_load, set_force_load_x, set_force_load_y
method_groups.mass: mass_add, mass_add_x, mass_add_y, mass_gravity, mass_inertial, set_mass_add, set_mass_add_x, set_mass_add_y
method_groups.pos: pos, pos_x, pos_y, set_pos, set_pos_x, set_pos_y
method_groups.temp: set_temp, set_temp_change, set_temp_source, temp, temp_change, temp_source
method_groups.vel: set_vel, set_vel_x, set_vel_y, vel, vel_x, vel_y

fallback_hints.batch creation: For creating many balls with packing patterns, use itasca.command('ball generate ...')
fallback_hints.cubic packing: Python SDK doesn't support cubic packing. Use itasca.command('ball generate cubic ...')
fallback_hints.hexagonal packing: Python SDK doesn't support hexagonal packing. Use itasca.command('ball generate hexagonal ...')
fallback_hints.model solve: For solving to equilibrium, use itasca.command('model solve'). Python SDK has itasca.cycle() for fixed cycles only.
fallback_hints.automatic timestep: For automatic timestep calculation, use itasca.command('model auto dt'). Python SDK itasca.set_timestep() sets manual values only.
